input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 23 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "gi", "count": 7, "message": "7 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "general", "count": 4, "message": "4 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 3, "message": "3 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 3, "message": "3 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 208, "current_utilization": 27, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: St. Michael's has 23 incoming patients. Immediately activate infection control for the 7 GI patients and consider isolation protocols for the 3 respiratory patients. While capacity is stable for the next two hours, be prepared to divert CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Toronto General, or Mount Sinai if patient load increases.
